name: ASOTools
description: ASOTools — free ASO tool and professional app data provider with 50M+ keywords and 6M+ apps across iOS and Android, acquired by Appark.ai and now fully free to use.

seo.title: ASOTools — App Growth Tooling (ASO)
seo.meta_description: ASOTools: ASOTools — free ASO tool and professional app data provider with 50M+ keywords and 6M+ apps across iOS and Android, acquired by Appark.ai and now full

when_to_use: Free keyword research across 50M+ app store keywords
Analyzing top-ranking apps for keyword density and metadata patterns
Identifying long-tail keyword opportunities for niche app categories
Bulk keyword difficulty scoring for iOS and Android ASO planning

pros: Low-risk starting point for ASO beginners
cons: Free model raises long-term sustainability questions
Feature depth capped vs premium suites
review.verdict: Hard to beat for a zero-cost ASO starter kit, but don't rely on it for mission-critical decisions.
review.best_for: Students, indie devs, and new marketers exploring ASO for free
review.not_for: Teams that need guaranteed data freshness and support
